{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232012111BC007AD1FE204853490"}"},"total":23},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602917292335088408","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"认真的看完 、我说此书直得看看！述说情节内容丰富多彩 ！很好！[赞][赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770192741,"group_id":"7586096410676710425","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"胡涂的快乐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N87pjpbKl9b05HX9Nix1QyI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"157960915141374","user_name":"虎头梭哈"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"157960915141374","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586096410676710425","book_info":{"abstract":"        【评分刚出，可忽略不计】
        系统不提供任何帮助，自备五十斤物资穿越大唐是什么体验？

        穷困大学生程勇意外获得魂穿体验系统，将于24小时后强制魂穿大唐。
　　
　　本以为是逆袭人生的开始，结果得知魂穿后系统将陷入沉睡，不会给他提供任何帮助;
　　
　　不仅如此，系统为他选择的穿越对象，还是一个负债累累、被逼绝境、已然活不过三天的小商人。
　　
　　面对天崩开局，程勇以死相逼，为自己争取到了可携带25公斤物资一起穿越的福利。
　　
　　为了自备金手指好在大唐立足，接下来的24小时，成为了他是否可逆天改命的关键......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4c1dc4013b019a25a43e8810b659008f","author":"大黑袍","author_id":"","book_id":"7586096410676710425","book_name":"自备物资穿大唐：李二求我做女婿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7902人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":73,"name":"大唐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=73&name=大唐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586298225317904921","read_count":"7902","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"236119"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.1","serial_count":"109","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,大唐,系统,穿越,囤物资,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/430de6ab9a2641734adb8413b5a632ed~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451931&x-signature=06cQoAiuGI2vYxpYAFQyU1FjGL0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1402613822920532","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"53"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232012111BC007AD1FE204853490"}"},"relate_i        【评分刚出，可忽略不计】
        系统不提供任何帮助，自备五十斤物资穿越大唐是什么体验？

        穷困大学生程勇意外获得魂穿体验系统，将于24小时后强制魂穿大唐。
　　
　　本以为是逆袭人生的开始，结果得知魂穿后系统将陷入沉睡，不会给他提供任何帮助;
　　
　　不仅如此，系统为他选择的穿越对象，还是一个负债累累、被逼绝境、已然活不过三天的小商人。
　　
　　面对天崩开局，程勇以死相逼，为自己争取到了可携带25公斤物资一起穿越的福利。
